title: Supply Chain Manager - Evergreen India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Evergreen India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Evergreen India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Evergreen India:
Evergreen India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Evergreen India!
